priority_matrix.item: R01: Rewrite multipart upload to use FormData (lib/multipart.js + optionhelper.js)
R03: Fix previous() falsy value bug in record.js
R04: Replace deprecated querystring with URLSearchParams (index.js)
R05: Remove unnecessary url module import (optionhelper.js)
R06: Replace _changed Array with Set in record.js
R07: Simplify hasChanged control flow in record.js
R08: Fix getVersions magic HTTP URL in index.js
R09: Remove dead callback scaffolding from _getOpts in index.js
R10: Add use strict to five CommonJS files
R11: Remove unnecessary self = this aliases in index.js and record.js
R13: Replace getBody if/else chain with dispatch map object
R14: Fix _extensionEnabled dead assignment on wrong object in fdcstream.js
R15: Implement gzip decompression or remove the gzip option entirely
R17: Complete ES6 class migration — move all prototype methods into lib/connection.js
R18: Extract lib/plugin.js — separate Plugin system from index.js
R19: Split index.js by responsibility domain into focused modules
R16: Migrate to ESM modules (deferred — use R10 strict mode addition now)

implementation_sequence.item: R01: Rewrite multipart upload to use FormData
implementation_sequence.rationale: The feature is completely broken — sends a multipart Content-Type header with no body. Fix first before any other changes as it affects real user functionality.
Timeout config is silently ignored for all non-auth API calls. Pattern already exists in _apiAuthRequest; direct copy. Apply early as it changes _apiRequest which is touched in later refactors.

implementation_sequence.item: R03: Fix previous() falsy value bug in record.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Correctness bug: one-character change (in operator vs truthiness), no design implications. Fix immediately.

implementation_sequence.item: R04: Replace deprecated querystring with URLSearchParams
implementation_sequence.rationale: Mechanical module replacement. Apply before Phase 4 class migration so the class file starts clean.

implementation_sequence.item: R05: Remove unnecessary url module import
implementation_sequence.rationale: One-line deletion with no side effects. Include in the same session as R04.

implementation_sequence.item: R06: Replace _changed Array with Set in record.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Self-contained change to record.js. Improves performance and simplifies set() guard. Apply before R07 which depends on .size vs .length.

implementation_sequence.item: R07: Simplify hasChanged control flow in record.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Apply after R06 so the simplified version uses .size and .has() from the Set. Pure readability change.

implementation_sequence.item: R08: Fix getVersions magic HTTP URL
implementation_sequence.rationale: Corrects wrong behavior for all non-na1 orgs. Mechanical change, no dependencies.

implementation_sequence.item: R09: Remove dead callback scaffolding from _getOpts
implementation_sequence.rationale: Simplifies _getOpts before R17 class migration moves all call sites. Easier to verify all 30+ callers are updated if the signature is clean first.

implementation_sequence.item: R10: Add use strict to five CommonJS files
implementation_sequence.rationale: Zero-risk consistency fix. Apply before Phase 4 so any latent issues surface in tests immediately.

implementation_sequence.item: R11: Remove unnecessary self = this aliases in index.js and record.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Clean up self before the class migration in R17. Arrow function conversion in record.js reduces noise; self aliases in index.js methods become this references.
Clarifies call sites before R17 moves all prototype methods into the class. The clear method names document intent at each CRUD call site.

implementation_sequence.item: R13: Replace getBody if/else chain with dispatch map object
implementation_sequence.rationale: Apply before R17 so the map is part of the class file from the start. Low risk, adds extensibility.

implementation_sequence.item: R14: Fix _extensionEnabled dead assignment in fdcstream.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Small isolated cleanup. Apply before Phase 4 to prevent dead code migrating into any new modules.

implementation_sequence.item: R15: Implement gzip decompression or remove the gzip option entirely
implementation_sequence.rationale: Resolve the validated-but-broken option. Decision gates whether constants.js and connection.js validation are updated. Complete before architectural split so the final module structure reflects the resolved state.
Self-contained extraction; no dependency on the class migration. Extract first so R17 can immediately require it rather than re-extracting during the larger migration.

implementation_sequence.item: R17: Complete ES6 class migration — move all prototype methods into lib/connection.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Foundation for R19. Requires R09 (clean _getOpts signature), R11 (self cleanup), and R18 (plugin module) to be done. Highest single effort item; do on a feature branch.

implementation_sequence.item: R19: Split index.js by responsibility domain into focused modules
implementation_sequence.rationale: Requires R17 complete. Final architectural step that eliminates the God Object. index.js becomes a thin composition root.

Deferred: requires changes to all require() calls, test infrastructure, and module.exports. Track as a separate initiative after the architectural split stabilizes. R10 (use strict) provides the immediate consistency fix.
